title: erigeron tenuis
intro: Erigeron tenuis, also known as the narrow-leaved fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The medicinal properties of Erigeron tenuis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Erigeron tenuis is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
